case_title: EDWARD PALMER VS. WELLS FARGO DEALER SERVICES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JIM SEARLS, WELLS FARGO MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO DEALER SERVICES

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108A) MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/07/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,046.00 FILED BY PALMER, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO DEALER SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-06-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PRIOR TO THE START OF TODAYS HEARING, JUDGE ROBERTSON DISCLOSES TO ALL PARTIES PRESENT THAT HE OWNS STOCK IN WELLS FARGO AND THAT UNLESS ALL PARTIES AGREE TO HIM HEARING THE MATTER, HE WILL CONTINUE THIS TO ANOTHER JUDGE. ALL PARTIES AGREE AND SIGN A WRITTEN STATEMENT PREPARED BY JUDGE ROBERTSON. PLAINTIFF EDWARD PALMER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO DEALER SERVICES REPRESENTED BY JIM SEARLS, BUSINESS LIASON CONSULTANT IS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SC-108 ANSWER TO THE SC-105 REQUEST FILED: SEPT-24-19 FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO DEALER SERVICES
(SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL THE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALMER, EDWARD
REMARK: RETURN MAIL SENT TO PLAINTIFF - UNABLE TO FORWARD
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALMER, EDWARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO DEALER SERVICES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF NOV-01-2019
